title: BEM-840 execute 839
objective:
Run script:
"""
sep='\n'
for d in ['governance/state','governance/reports','governance/tasks/pending','governance/handoff','governance/transport','governance/workflow_dispatch_queue']:
    Path(d).mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
created='2026-05-22 | 06:00 (UTC+3)'
def load(p):
    p=Path(p)
    try: return json.loads(p.read_text(errors='ignore')) if p.exists() else {}
    except Exception as exc: return {'_load_error':str(exc)}
def read(p):
    p=Path(p)
    return p.read_text(errors='ignore') if p.exists() else ''
prev=load('governance/state/bem839_verify_after_response_retry_tick.json')
missing=prev.get('missing',[])
status_in=prev.get('status')
created_files=[]
# Direct action, not routing-only: repair first missing proof and make evidence visible.
if 'workflow_dispatch_results' in missing:
    p=Path('governance/workflow_dispatch_queue/bem840_valid_self_dispatch_probe.json')
    p.write_text(json.dumps({'schema_version':'workflow_dispatch_queue_item.v9','workflow':'codex-runner.yml','workflow_id':'codex-runner.yml','ref':'main','inputs':{},'reason':'BEM-840 valid self dispatch probe after operator escalation','created_at':created},indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
    created_files.append(str(p))
    status='created_valid_self_dispatch_probe'
    next_action='fresh tick and require workflow_dispatch_results evidence'
elif 'claude_runtime_state' in missing:
    p=Path('governance/workflow_dispatch_queue/bem840_valid_claude_runtime_probe.json')
    p.write_text(json.dumps({'schema_version':'workflow_dispatch_queue_item.v9','workflow':'claude-internal-auditor-dispatcher.yml','workflow_id':'claude-internal-auditor-dispatcher.yml','ref':'main','inputs':{},'reason':'BEM-840 valid Claude runtime probe after dispatch proof','created_at':created},indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
    created_files.append(str(p))
    status='created_valid_claude_runtime_probe'
    next_action='fresh tick and verify Claude runtime state'
elif 'real_claude_response' in missing:
    # Strengthen mailbox request so Claude has an explicit answer target; then queue dispatcher.
    req=Path('governance/audit_mailbox/gpt_to_claude/bem840_real_response_required.md')
    req.parent.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
    req.write_text('# BEM-840 | REAL CLAUDE RESPONSE REQUIRED'+sep+sep+'Дата: '+created+sep+'Claude Internal Auditor: answer the current multi-agent architecture/protocol agreement request. Explain prior missing response if visible from repo evidence. Write response to governance/audit_mailbox/claude_to_gpt/bem840_claude_response.md. Include Decision: APPROVED / CHANGE_REQUIRED / BLOCKED. No issue comments.'+sep)
    p=Path('governance/workflow_dispatch_queue/bem840_valid_claude_response_probe.json')
    p.write_text(json.dumps({'schema_version':'workflow_dispatch_queue_item.v9','workflow':'claude-internal-auditor-dispatcher.yml','workflow_id':'claude-internal-auditor-dispatcher.yml','ref':'main','inputs':{},'reason':'BEM-840 valid Claude response probe after runtime proof','created_at':created},indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
    created_files.extend([str(req),str(p)])
    status='created_real_response_request_and_dispatch_probe'
    next_action='fresh tick and verify real Claude response file'
else:
    status='triad_present_process_protocol'
    next_action='process real Claude response and create agreed protocol'
state={'bem':'BEM-840','status':status,'input_status':status_in,'input_missing':missing,'created_files':created_files,'next_action':next_action,'created_at':created}
Path('governance/state/bem840_execute_bem839_next.json').write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/reports/bem840_execute_bem839_next.md').write_text('# BEM-840 | Execute BEM-839 Next | '+status+sep+sep+json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/tasks/pending/bem840_next.md').write_text('Next: '+next_action+sep+'Operator relay forbidden. Report does not stop development.'+sep)
Path('governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md').write_text('# GPT NEXT ACTION | BEM-840'+sep+sep+'Status: '+status+sep+'Next: '+next_action+sep)
with Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl').open('a',encoding='utf-8') as h: h.write(json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
changed=['governance/state/bem840_execute_bem839_next.json','governance/reports/bem840_execute_bem839_next.md','governance/tasks/pending/bem840_next.md','governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md','governance/transport/results.jsonl']+created_files
changed_files.extend(changed)
ops_applied.append('Executed BEM-839 next action directly by creating a valid proof probe for the first missing smoke proof')
"""
